name: emulator-readonly-bridge-protocol

request.target_rule: The adapter must not accept a physical device serial. Target selection is delegated to the contract-gated runner and lower-level emulator-only bridge.

response.stdout_policy: Captured output from the contract-gated runner.
response.stderr_policy: Captured errors from the contract-gated runner.

forbidden_behavior: Do not accept arbitrary ADB arguments.
Do not accept arbitrary shell commands.
Do not accept a physical device serial.
Do not perform write, flash, erase, install, uninstall, sideload, reboot, remount, root, wipe, repair, or rescue operations.
